title: Implement resource management security in Azure
summary: Learn how to secure resources using policy, role-based access control, and other Azure services

sections.title: Implement resource management security in Azure
sections.summary: Learn how to secure resources using policy, role-based access control, and other Azure services

lessons.title: Control and organize Azure resources with Azure Resource Manager
lessons.content_md:
Use Azure Resource Manager to organize resources, enforce standards, and protect critical assets from deletion.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/control-and-organize-with-azure-resource-manager/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Control and organize Azure resources with Azure Resource Manager

lessons.title: Secure your Azure resources with Azure role-based access control (Azure RBAC)
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use Azure role-based access control to effectively manage your team's access to Azure resources.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/secure-azure-resources-with-rbac/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Secure your Azure resources with Azure role-based access control (Azure RBAC)

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Implement resource management security in Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Implement resource management security in Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
